description: Compact Copper stage windows (one row per well + copper stage) built from merged_copper_labels_v1.copper_continuous by nextier_merged_copper_stage_index_v1. Canonical stage source for the Copper Stage Detection dashboard, scoring, and anomaly workflows.
sql: SELECT name, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS copper_stage_num, fleet_name, pad_name, id AS well_id, api_num, CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS stage_start_ts, CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS stage_end_ts, CAST(NULL AS BOOLEAN) AS is_closed, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS sample_count, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS avg_rate_slurry, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS max_rate_slurry, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS avg_press_mainline, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS max_press_mainline, CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS stage_layer, CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS algorithm_version, CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS processing_run_id, CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS created_at FROM datastore:merged_fleet_stream_customer_full_v2 WHERE 1 = 0
